subject: FW: Merry Christmas
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

From: Eman Moss [mailto:emanmoss@yahoo.co.uk]

Hi Lesley,
 
Wishing you and your family a Merry Christmas and a very Happy New Year
2008!
 
Could you kindly let me know the postal address for where Jeffrey is
going in Florida pls, 
(I would like to send him some books) also his birthday is Jan 21st,
correct?
 
Many thanks and best wishes,
Emanuelle
